metadata.title: Imagine School — Decorative Coatings Academy
metadata.description: Basic course "Master Decorator". Learn decorative plastering from the best masters of Imagine Decor.

hero.title: The First Online School of Decorative Coatings
hero.subtitle: Want to Become a Decorator but Don't Know Where to Start? We're Here to Help!

videoIntro.title: Training program led by the best master decorators of "Imagine Decor"

item1.title: Creative Freedom
item1.description: A master decorator is a creative and clean profession that allows you to express yourself fully.

item2.title: Frequent Location Changes
item2.description: You don't stay at one site for months — decorative finishing is done very quickly.

item3.title: Never Gets Boring
item3.description: A great variety of textures, styles, and techniques keeps you excited about every new project.

item4.title: Easy to Learn
item4.description: Master a few basic decor types, and you'll be able to perform virtually any application technique.

item5.title: Profitable Career
item5.description: On average, 1m² of work costs $10–12. An experienced master can easily complete 20–50m² per day.

item6.title: Work-Life Balance
item6.description: A master decorator works per project and gets paid per 1m² of finished wall. You decide when to work or rest.

courseOverview.title: Basic Course "Master Decorator"
courseOverview.subtitle: Want to Become a Decorator but Don't Know Where to Start? We're Here to Help!

format.label: Format
format.value: Online course with video lessons in Personal Dashboard

courseProgram.title: Course Program
courseProgram.description: Over 10 hours of video content with theory and practice — everything you need to become a master decorator.

section1.title: I. Theory
section1.item1: Welcome and guidance with course completion recommendations
section1.item2: Decorator tools overview: how to choose and the minimum set to get started
section1.item3: What is decorative plaster, textured vs thin-layer differences, composition, characteristics, cheat sheets and life hacks
section1.item4: Preparation work: proper wall preparation, masking tape application, priming

section2.title: II. Practice
section2.subtitle: 10 core application techniques in detailed practical sessions
section2.item1: Three lessons on textured, coarse-grained plasters
section2.item2: Four lessons on the most popular thin-layer decorative plasters: various techniques, working on large walls, solo and pair work
section2.item3: Two lessons on Venetian plaster: classic technique and chipped marble with polishing

section3.title: III. Start Earning
section3.item1: How and where to find work as a beginner decorator — from our 10 years of experience
section3.item2: Growing on social media: Instagram, YouTube, Facebook
section3.item3: How to collaborate and find partners for stable work

section4.title: Bonus
section4.item1: Feedback and technical support via WhatsApp, Viber
section4.item2: 30% discount on all Imagine Decor products as a master decorator

footer.tagline: Discover New Opportunities with Imagine School
footer.subtitle: You can definitely do this!
